name: Gala Apricot Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oats, brown sugar, flour and margarine. Press mixture onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 15 minutes. Cool.
2. Soften gelatin in cold water; stir until dissolved.
3. In a bowl, mix Cream Cheese and granulated sugar with an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
4. Gradually add the gelatin and brandy to the cream cheese mixture, mixing until well combined.
5. Chill mixture until slightly thickened. Fold in apricots and whipped cream.
6. Pour into crust; chill until firm.
7. Heat combined preserves and brandy over low heat. Cool. Spoon over cheesecake before serving.
